description_long: This object is a modern wristwatch with a round, dark-colored case and a matching strap. The watch face is slightly raised and appears to have a glossy finish, with a subtle blue accent visible on the side of the strap. The strap is perforated with adjustment holes and features a smooth, flexible texture, likely made from silicone or rubber. The case is compact and streamlined, with no visible buttons or crowns, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A sleek, modern wristwatch with a round dark case and a smooth, perforated strap featuring blue accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the round case and the blue accent on the strap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round watch face and the full length of the strap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the case profile and strap, with less visible blue accent.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the case and the adjustment holes on the strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is not clearly visible, but the design appears minimalist with a smooth, glossy surface and no visible markers or subdials.
attribute_strap_type: Flexible silicone or rubber strap with adjustment holes and a blue accent.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display implied by the round face, but no hands or digits are visible; likely minimalist with no complications.
